title: cyanus celikhanensis
intro: Cyanus celikhanensis, also known as Celikhan cornflower, is a plant species in the daisy family. It is a flowering plant with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help in reducing pain, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Cyanus celikhanensis is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal benefits.
